tools.name: getPromptMeta
tools.description: Retrieves a Crafted Intelligence prompt record with all orchestration metadata. Returns prompt text, category, toolset, tool chain, steps (JSON), edition, params (JSON), safety rules (JSON), governance level, artifact hints, usage analytics, and discovery metadata. The AI calls this as its FIRST step when executing any Crafted prompt — it provides the full context needed to invoke the correct tools in the correct order. Pass either the prompt internal ID or the external ID (dz_cp_*). Independent from Oracle AI Companion — queries customrecord_dz_companion_prompt directly, no JOIN. JSON fields (steps, params, safety_rules, tool_deps, related) are parsed into structured objects.

promptId.description: Internal ID of the Crafted Intelligence prompt record (customrecord_dz_companion_prompt). Use this when you know the prompt's internal ID.

externalId.description: External ID of the Crafted prompt (e.g., 'dz_cp_barrel_001'). Used if promptId is not provided. Matches the externalid field on customrecord_dz_companion_prompt.

prompt_id.description: Internal ID of the Crafted Intelligence prompt record.

prompt_text.description: Full prompt text (user-facing). May start with a [Crafted Prompt #ID ...] header.

category.description: Crafted category: Barrel Operations, Lot Profitability, Inventory & Supply Chain, Compliance & Audit, MRP Intelligence, Batch & Genealogy, or General.

description.description: Short 1-2 sentence description shown on the Library SPA prompt card.

public.description: Whether the prompt is visible in the Library SPA (vs. internal/testing).

entry_tool.description: First tool the AI should call.

steps.description: Parsed JSON array of orchestration steps with call, purpose, condition, depends_on, params_from.

tool_deps.description: Parsed JSON array of required toolset script IDs.

edition.description: Target edition: Distillery, Winery, Brewery, or Cross-Edition.

edition_notes.description: Edition-specific behavior guidance for the AI.

params.description: Parsed JSON parameter schema with types, hints, resolves_to.

safety_rules.description: Parsed JSON array of non-hallucination and data quality rules.

governance.description: Governance tier: Minimal, Standard, Governed, or Supervised.

artifact.description: Whether this prompt generates a visual artifact.

status.description: Lifecycle status: Active, Draft, Testing, or Deprecated.

exec_count.description: Total execution count across all versions.

last_executed.description: Timestamp of most recent execution (ISO datetime string).

avg_duration.description: Running average execution duration in seconds.

collection.description: Collection name for workflow grouping (e.g., 'Month-End Close').

related.description: Parsed JSON array of related prompt external IDs for 'run next' suggestions.

complexity.description: User-facing complexity: Quick, Standard, or Deep Analysis.

tools.name: logExecution
tools.description: Creates a lightweight execution log record (customrecord_dz_exec_log) for a Crafted prompt run. Records which prompt was executed, which tools were called, whether it succeeded or failed, duration in seconds, which prompt version was running, and which AI agent ran it. Also updates usage analytics on the prompt record: increments execution count, sets last executed timestamp, updates running average duration. Analytics update is best-effort — log success is authoritative. Called by the AI after completing (or failing) a prompt execution.

promptId.description: Internal ID of the Crafted Intelligence prompt that was executed (customrecord_dz_companion_prompt).

toolsCalled.description: JSON array string of tool names called during execution. Example: '["getBarrelProfile","getBarrelCostTrace"]'.

duration.description: Total execution duration in seconds from first tool call to final output.

error.description: Error message or failure reason if execution failed. Omit on success.

promptVersion.description: Semantic version of the prompt record at execution time (e.g., '1.0.0'). Copy from getPromptMeta response.

agent.description: AI agent name that executed the prompt. Valid values: 'claude', 'chatgpt'.

success.description: Whether the log record was created.

logId.description: Internal ID of the created execution log record.

tools.name: seedPrompt
tools.description: Creates a Crafted Intelligence prompt record (customrecord_dz_companion_prompt) in a single idempotent operation. If a prompt with the given externalId already exists, returns the existing record ID without creating a duplicate. Use to programmatically seed domain prompts into the Companion Library. Pass category, toolset, steps, and other orchestration fields to configure the prompt. Role visibility is set via rolePatterns (seed-time fuzzy match against account roles) — the Map/Reduce seed script is the preferred path for bulk seeding with full role resolution.

externalId.description: Unique external ID for idempotent creation (e.g., 'dz_cp_barrel_003'). Should start with 'dz_cp_'.

promptText.description: User-facing prompt text. May include a [Crafted Prompt #ID ...] header to trigger orchestration.

description.description: Short 1-2 sentence description for the Library SPA prompt card.

category.description: Category list value ID. Values: 1=Barrel Operations, 2=Lot Profitability, 3=Inventory & Supply Chain, 4=Compliance & Audit, 5=MRP Intelligence, 6=Batch & Genealogy, 7=General.

public.description: Whether the prompt appears in the Library SPA (default: true). Set false for internal/testing prompts.

steps.description: JSON string of orchestration steps array.

toolDeps.description: JSON string array of required toolset script IDs.

safetyRules.description: JSON string array of safety rules.

governance.description: Governance level list value ID. Values: 1=Minimal, 2=Standard, 3=Governed, 4=Supervised.

artifact.description: Whether prompt generates a visual artifact.

collection.description: Collection name for workflow grouping (e.g., 'Month-End Close').

related.description: JSON string array of related prompt external IDs.

complexity.description: User-facing complexity list value ID. Values: 1=Quick, 2=Standard, 3=Deep Analysis.

rolePatterns.description: JSON string array of role name patterns for seed-time role matching. Example: '["Administrator","Warehouse"]'.

promptId.description: Internal ID of the Crafted Intelligence prompt record.

tools.name: updatePrompt
tools.description: Updates an existing Crafted Intelligence prompt record. Automatically bumps the patch version (e.g., 1.0.0 -> 1.0.1) unless a specific newVersion is provided. Only provided fields are updated — omitted fields are left unchanged. Single record update — no Atlas dependency, no two-phase logic.

promptId.description: Internal ID of the Crafted Intelligence prompt record to update.

promptText.description: New prompt text. If omitted, prompt text is not changed.

promptName.description: New prompt display name. If omitted, name is not changed.

description.description: New 1-2 sentence description for the Library SPA card.

governance.description: New governance level list value ID (1-4).

related.description: New related prompts JSON array string.

newVersion.description: Explicit new version (e.g., '2.0.0'). If omitted, patch version is auto-incremented.

updatedFields.description: Array of field names that were updated.
